name: Furusato Industries, Ltd.
summary: Furusato Industries,Ltd. provides steel frame building supplies for steel fabricators in Japan. It operates through Equipment & Tools, Machine & Facility, and Construction & Piping Products segments. The company also offers piping products for buildings and production facilities; automation materials and industrial equipment, such as consumable supplies and tools, and machines and tools manufacturers and retailers; and machine and tools for the automotive industry. In addition, it provides housing equipment, including kitchen equipment, bathroom equipment, washing stand, gas equipment, boiler equipment, sanitary equipment, and exterior materials; and surveillance cameras, access control equipment, other security products, and related consulting and technical services. Further, the company sells cutting tools, machine tools, and peripherals; and imports, exports, and sells building supplies, equipment, and tools. The company was formerly known as Furusato Tekkosho Ltd. and changed its name to Furusato Industries,Ltd. in 1973. Furusato Industries,Ltd. was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
